comments.LineComment: | This is the dual parser bridge: Foundry scrapes pixels into ExtractedElement
| (Schema atoms), this module converts to Element, and Element renders to any
| **Same atoms → Same Element → Same output. Every user. Every time.**
| 1. **Schema atoms are the truth**: All visual properties come from bounded,
|    typed Schema atoms. No CSS parsing, no string manipulation.
| 2. **Pure transformation**: ExtractedElement in, Element out. No effects.
| 3. **Recursive structure**: ExtractedElement trees become Element trees.
| 4. **GPU-ready**: The resulting Element can flatten to DrawCommands for
